mapper.select: SELECT i.item_id, i.name, i.description, i.price::numeric AS price, i.added_at, i.updated_at, i.quantity, i.category_id, i.wear_id, u.first_name, u.last_name, it.tag_id FROM ebock.item i INNER JOIN ebock.user_ u ON i.seller_cip = u.cip LEFT JOIN ebock.tag_item it ON i.item_id = it.item_id WHERE i.seller_cip = #{cip} AND NOT i.archived;

SELECT i.item_id, i.name, i.description, i.price::numeric AS price, i.added_at, i.updated_at, i.quantity, c.name as category_name, w.name as wear_name, i.seller_cip, p.name as payment_option, d.name as delivery_option, it.tag_id FROM ebock.item i INNER JOIN ebock.category c ON i.category_id = c.category_id INNER JOIN ebock.wear w ON i.wear_id = w.wear_id LEFT JOIN ebock.tag_item it ON i.item_id = it.item_id LEFT JOIN ebock.item_paym_option ip ON ip.item_id = i.item_id LEFT JOIN ebock.payment_option p ON ip.payment_optn_id = p.payment_optn_id LEFT JOIN ebock.item_del_option id ON id.item_id = i.item_id LEFT JOIN ebock.delivery_option d ON id.delivery_optn_id = d.delivery_optn_id WHERE i.item_id = #{id} AND NOT i.archived;
mapper.insert: insert into ebock.item (name, description, price, added_at, updated_at, sold, quantity, archived, category_id, wear_id, seller_cip) values (#{item.name}, #{item.description}, #{item.price}, now(), now(), false, #{item.quantity}, false, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.wearId}, #{item.sellerCip})
mapper.update: update ebock.item set name=#{item.name}, description=#{item.description}, price=#{item.price}, updated_at=now(), quantity=#{item.quantity}, category_id=#{item.categoryId}, wear_id=#{item.wearId} where item_id = #{item.itemId} and seller_cip = #{sellerCip}
